# Workflow: SEO Cluster

## Trigger
SEO initiative

## Objective
Rank for target keywords

## Inputs
- Keyword list

## Outputs
- Content cluster

## Steps
1. Identify pillar topic
2. Map cluster topics
3. Create content plan
4. Write content
5. Interlink pages
6. Optimize metadata
7. Track rankings

## KPIs
- Rankings
- Traffic
- Impressions

## Deliverables
- SEO system
